data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
select sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.membership_no, sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.member_group_no , '' as manager_name, '' as manager_position ,'' as monthly_date ,'' as member_name ,'' as coop_name ,'' as mem_title ,'' as address_title
from sc_cls_mon_mem_shr
where 1=1 /*WHERE*/
